description: Atelier B Community Edition - IDE for formal modelling and verification with the B method
notes: Atelier B Community Edition is proprietary freeware (ClearSy EULA).
Installed portably under Scoop's user-writable app dir, which avoids the upstream
'Program Files is read-only / cannot reach press/bdb' problem on locked-down PCs.
The project database is kept in %USERPROFILE%\AtelierB_Data and survives upgrades.
The Windows build ships no icon, so the Start Menu icon is shipped as a release
asset (atelier-b.ico) by this repo. The download URL embeds an opaque upload path,
so 'url'/'hash' (and the icon asset) are bumped by hand - checkver only flags it.
